_note: Practice answer set B — architecture/plan doc. Keys are template field ids; choice fields use option values.
role_title: Cracked senior fullstack developer at a YC startup
role_specialisation: Claude Code tooling, React UI, security, 12-factor apps
objective_goal: Design a Claude Code plugin that runs the halalprompt questionnaire keylessly

context_hard_constraints: Lightweight and fast; no copyright violations; reuse template.ts
scope_include: Implementation plan, strategies, libraries, trade-offs, overheads, estimated stats
